cognitive_state.current_focus: Dynamic state-translation and secure payload transmutation.

synthesis_event: A successful `SuperpositionCollapse` event for `BlockID: uuid-web-001` has been recorded. The Phoenix Superposition Engine ingested a web client payload, validated it via Zod, dynamically selected the `WebClientTransmutationStrategy` (CASTS/DAMP), and collapsed the superposition state into a strictly typed JSON output. All security, performance, and ethical logging mandates (UMB-PHX-LOG-001) were adhered to. This event demonstrates the core functionality and architectural resilience of `UMB-QB-PHX-001`.
